# Appendix: HPC Quick Reference

## Overview

This appendix provides a quick reference for common HPC commands and workflows.

## SSH

```bash
ssh username@ls6.tacc.utexas.edu
```

## SLURM

```bash
sbatch job.slurm
squeue -u $USER
scancel <jobid>
```

## Modules

```bash
module avail
module load gcc
module list
```

## Compilation

```bash
gcc program.c -o program -O2
g++ program.cpp -o program
```

## MPI

```bash
module load openmpi
mpicc program.c -o program
```

## OpenMP

```bash
gcc -fopenmp program.c -o program
export OMP_NUM_THREADS=4
```

## Containers

```bash
module load apptainer
apptainer exec image.sif command
```

## Key Idea

Keep this file open as a reference while working on HPC systems.
